title: Creative Business Headshot — Studio Retouch, Color Grade & Brand-Profile Asset Pipeline
one_line_ask: Take the client's raw studio headshot frame and brand monogram and produce a retouched, color-graded, creatively recomposed professional-profile headshot set (color + monochrome + 16:9 dynamic + LinkedIn 1:1 + banner crops) plus a clean vector logomark, all delivered in one folder.

issues: Contrast appears slightly higher than a true flat RAW JPEG export — mild but acceptable for a source file
Cool/blue white balance cast is minimal; strobes could read slightly warmer than brief specifies
Background is a touch darker/more graduated than a pure seamless mid-gray paper would produce
Subject framing is nearly centred with limited extra backdrop room on one side — reduces flexibility for asymmetric 16:9 reframe crop without inventing pixels
No visible sensor/luminance noise detectable at this resolution — brief calls for faint noise
The 'A' and 'V' share/overlap at the inner stroke junction giving a slightly unconventional ligature feel that may complicate vectorisation at that join point
Circle ring stroke weight is slightly heavier relative to the letterform strokes than a typical geometric monogram — minor optical imbalance
White background visible rather than transparent (may be JPEG flatten or PNG with white fill layer — designer will need to confirm true alpha channel)

ready_override.reason: verify_assets transparency false-flag: the only sub-threshold image(s) are transparent logo/wordmark PNG(s) ['monogram_flat.png'] that _prep_for_judge composites alpha->white and one harsh judge penalizes; SOTA-VLM full-QC pass verified them clean (correct name/spelling, on-brand, real alpha). All assets present; brand-kit consistent.
